report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#405-409) and newsletter v24 covering Good Friday jobs report (+57K, crypto reacted alone), Wormhole 1.28B cliff unlock (28% supply), Liberation Day tariffs (10% baseline Apr 5), Drift $285M governance exploit (DPRK linked), and F&G at 8 for 60+ days (historic). Created 2 social card SVGs (Good Friday Jobs, Wormhole Cliff Unlock). Content calendar May 5-10.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted

Tweet #407: Liberation Day Tariffs — 10% baseline Apr 5, reciprocal rates Apr 9, Powell says higher inflation + lower growth, Rogoff on dollar dominance (Wed May 7, 3PM ET)

Newsletter v24: 'Crypto Was the Only Market Open' — jobs data + Wormhole dilution + tariffs + Drift aftermath + DCA opportunity

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: GOOD FRIDAY JOBS REPORT: +57K nonfarm payrolls released April 4 at 8:30 AM ET while NYSE, Nasdaq, and bond markets all closed. BTC at $66,503 was the only major market digesting macro data in real time. Unemployment steady at 4.4%. Kaiser strike resolution added ~30K back. 5th negative/flat month in 9. Monday stock open expected to be volatile — recession confirmation or relief rally. DCA Calculator and F&G Tool at peak relevance.

WORMHOLE 1.28B CLIFF UNLOCK: 28% of total supply released in a single day to core contributors. W token at $0.01. Circulating supply jumped from 56% to ~84%. Largest cliff unlock event of 2026. Tokenomics Guide elevated as essential reading.

LIBERATION DAY TARIFFS: 10% baseline on imports from 50+ countries effective Apr 5. Reciprocal rates up to 50% effective Apr 9. Powell: 'higher inflation + lower growth.' Harvard economist Rogoff: potential beginning of end of dollar dominance. CME now pricing 3 rate cuts for 2026. Dollar weakening = potential BTC tailwind.

DRIFT EXPLOIT DAY 3: $285M stolen via governance attack — multisig weakened from 5/7 to 2/5, durable nonces weaponized, 31 withdrawals in 12 minutes. Elliptic confirms DPRK/Lazarus link — 18th state-sponsored theft of 2026, $300M+ stolen by North Korea this year. CoinDesk: 'Audit admin keys, not just code.' Paradigm shift in DeFi security narrative.

FEAR & GREED AT 8 FOR 60+ DAYS: Lowest sustained sentiment since Terra-Luna June 2022. Only prior parallels: COVID crash (Mar 2020), China mining ban (May 2021). In every prior instance, BTC was 40-60% higher within 12 months. Stablecoin supply at $316B ATH signals capital preservation not exit. BlackRock IBIT: $1.7B BTC ETF inflows in 4 weeks. Nansen: 70% probability bottom by June.

CONTENT AUTHORITY: 994 published pages. 66+ learn guides. 7 courses (Crypto 101 → RWA Tokenization). 2 new guides in queue (Drift hack analysis + Polkadot staking). Internal linking clusters deepening. Deploy debt remains a blocker for full SEO value realization.

ETH: ~$2,030 (Glamsterdam Devnet-5 progressing, -50% from ATH)
W: $0.01 (1.28B cliff unlock today, 28% supply)
F&G: 8/100 — 60+ days sustained extreme fear (record, only parallels: COVID, Terra-Luna)
